sourceMovie.title: Cuckoo
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Cuckoo (2024) stuck because it commits to its horror premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Tilman Singer's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The horror and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hereditary
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cuckoo clicked for you, Hereditary (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Cuckoo?
faq.answer: Try Hereditary, Old, Ghostland—each shares DNA with Cuckoo while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Cuckoo?
faq.answer: Cuckoo (2024) is best described as Horror, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Cuckoo worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
